title: Fix UI layout, RB partial supply display, Hallmark return flow, and Reconciliation order type preservation

requirements.summary: Update order row layout in TotalOrdersTab to match IMG_6511-2: display order number + sub-info on left, generic/type label in centre, date + ageing badge on right, red × delete icon far right; make entire child row clickable for selection; retain group header checkbox and design code click-to-open-modal
acceptanceCriteria: Child rows display: order number + sub-info on left, generic/type label in centre column, date + ageing badge on right, red × delete icon far right
Clicking anywhere on a child row toggles its selection (no dedicated checkbox column on child rows)
Group header checkbox still works for bulk select of all children
Clicking the design code in the group header opens the DesignImageModal with the correct design image

file_operations.description: Refactor child row rendering to match IMG_6511-2 layout: remove standalone checkbox column from child rows, display order number + Qty/Wt on left, generic/type label (e.g. CHAIN, IPL) in a separate centre column, date + ageing badge side by side on right, red × delete icon far right. Make entire child row clickable to toggle selection state. Retain group header checkbox for bulk selection and ensure design code in group header opens DesignImageModal on click.

Apply the same child row layout update as TotalOrdersTab to match IMG_6511-2: remove child row checkbox column, display order number + sub-info on left, generic/type label centre, date + ageing badge right, red × delete icon far right, and make entire child row clickable for selection. Retain group header checkbox and design code modal trigger.

Apply the same child row layout update as TotalOrdersTab to match IMG_6511-2: remove child row checkbox column, display order number + sub-info on left, generic/type label centre, date + ageing badge right, red × delete icon far right, and make entire child row clickable for selection. Retain group header checkbox and design code modal trigger.

Apply the same child row layout update to match IMG_6511-2 if this page uses the same grouped row structure: remove child row checkbox column, display order number + sub-info on left, generic/type label centre, date + ageing badge right, red × delete icon far right, and make entire child row clickable for selection. Retain group header checkbox and design code modal trigger.

Apply the same child row layout update to match IMG_6511-2 if this page uses the same grouped row structure: remove child row checkbox column, display order number + sub-info on left, generic/type label centre, date + ageing badge right, red × delete icon far right, and make entire child row clickable for selection. Retain group header checkbox and design code modal trigger.

Apply the same child row layout update to match IMG_6511-2 if this page uses the same grouped row structure: remove child row checkbox column, display order number + sub-info on left, generic/type label centre, date + ageing badge right, red × delete icon far right, and make entire child row clickable for selection. Retain group header checkbox and design code modal trigger.

requirements.summary: Fix Ready tab so that after a partial supply on an RB order, the supplied portion order row appears in the Ready tab with status Ready
acceptanceCriteria: After performing a partial supply on an RB order, the supplied portion row appears in the Ready tab with status Ready
The remaining unsupplied portion continues to appear in Total Orders with Pending status
No other tabs or order rows are affected

file_operations.description: Review the query or filter logic used to fetch Ready-status orders and ensure that newly supplied-portion orders (created by partial supply on RB orders) are correctly included when their status is Ready. Verify no additional frontend filter is excluding these rows.

Review the supply flow (SuppliedQtyDialog and related mutations) to ensure that when a partial supply is performed on an RB order, the frontend correctly invalidates queries so that the supplied portion (now Ready) appears in the Ready tab and the remaining portion (still Pending) remains in Total Orders.

Ensure that after calling the supply mutation for a partial RB order, the query invalidation includes both the Ready tab query and Total Orders query so that the UI reflects the supplied portion in Ready and the remaining portion in Total Orders immediately.

requirements.summary: Fix Hallmark tab 'Mark as Returned' action so that orders with status Hallmark are moved to Total Orders with status Pending after being marked as returned
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Mark as Returned' on a Hallmark-status order removes it from the Hallmark tab
The returned order appears in the Total Orders tab with status Pending
No other status transitions or tab behaviours are changed

file_operations.description: Review the 'Mark as Returned' button handler to ensure it calls the correct backend method (batchReturnOrdersToPending or equivalent) and that the mutation invalidates both the Hallmark tab query and the Total Orders query so that returned orders immediately disappear from Hallmark and reappear in Total Orders with status Pending.

Verify that the query used in TotalOrdersTab includes orders with status Pending returned from Hallmark, and that query invalidation after the Hallmark return mutation causes these orders to appear correctly.

requirements.summary: Fix Reconciliation page so that each row's parsed order type (RB, SO, or CO) is correctly preserved when rows are added to Total Orders
acceptanceCriteria: Each reconciliation row carries its correctly parsed order type (RB, SO, or CO) when saved to the backend
Orders added from reconciliation appear in Total Orders with their correct type (RB rows show RB, SO rows show SO, CO rows show CO)
No other reconciliation behaviour or parsing logic is changed

file_operations.description: Review the code that parses order type from the master file rows and ensure that when calling persistMasterDataRows, each MasterDataRow object includes the correctly parsed orderType (RB, SO, or CO). Verify that the frontend is not overriding the parsed type to CO before sending the data to the backend.
Review the master file parsing logic to confirm that the order type is correctly extracted and set on each MasterDataRow object, and that no default CO override is applied during parsing.
Verify that after reconciliation rows are persisted to the backend, the Total Orders tab query refresh correctly displays each order with its parsed type (RB, SO, or CO) as set in the MasterDataRow.
